title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 29.260 - Officers to have recourse to law
text:
29.260.  Officers to have recourse to law. — The provisions of this chapter shall not preclude any officer or officers in charge of the offices and institutions mentioned in this chapter from having proper recourse in the courts of law in this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 13104, A.L. 1945 p. 584 § 33, A.L. 2013 H.B. 116) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11488; 1919 § 13312
